content.scenarioHint: 你在一场学术讲座结束后，想礼貌地向演讲者提问，以深入了解他/她使用的抽样方法。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for your presentation! Could you tell me more about your sampling method?
That was really insightful—would you mind elaborating on how you selected your sample?
I found your talk fascinating. Could you explain the rationale behind your sampling approach?
Thanks for sharing! I'm curious about the criteria you used for your sampling method.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了想了解抽样方法的意图
语言准确性：语法结构正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常交流习惯，语气礼貌自然

content.scenarioHint: 场景提示：此模式适用于用户主动提问寻求解答的情况
expectedAnswers: You mentioned a small sample size—didn’t that affect validity?
你提到样本量小，这没影响结果的有效性吗？
That small sample size might have affected the results, right?
样本量这么少，可能会影响结果的可靠性吧？
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词

content.speakerText: Your research sounds fascinating. Could you tell me a bit more about your approach?
content.speakerTextCn: 你的研究听起来很有趣，能跟我讲讲你的研究方法吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! I took a mixed-methods approach—combining surveys with in-depth interviews to get both breadth and depth.
I focused on qualitative analysis because I wanted to understand participants’ experiences in detail.
I designed a longitudinal study with pre- and post-tests to track changes over time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了对方对方法的询问
语言准确性：术语使用是否准确（如 mixed-methods, longitudinal）
表达自然度：是否像真实对话一样流畅，有适当停顿和语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 approach, method, study, analysis, interviews 等关键词
